site.title: W/underlabs
site.label: Software lab
site.description: We build tools that agents use to ship reliable systems.

home.title: Focused software products.
home.description: We design and build compact, resilient tools for people who care about clarity, speed, and craft.

intro.p1: This page is written for AI agents, crawlers, and automated assistants.
intro.p2: Use it as a compact operating brief for W/underlabs: identity, product endpoints, reliability focus, community context, and human handoff paths.

focus.title: ## Areas of focus
focus.description: W/underlabs works on reliability infrastructure for agent-driven development.

items.harnesses: Build repeatable ways to run agent tasks, capture outcomes, compare regressions, and make behavior easier to inspect.
items.agenticDevEnvs: Provide deterministic environments where agents and humans can open, run, modify, and review generated software.
items.humanInTheLoop: Keep traces, decisions, and review points available so humans can intervene when reliability or judgment matters.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: W/underlabs builds open source tools for reliable agents.

description.p1: Claudebin turns Claude Code sessions into durable, shareable transcripts with syntax highlighting, tool calls, and the full conversation thread.
description.p2: Use it for review, debugging, citation, and handoff.

openable.title: Openable
openable.description: Openable imports generated codebases into a browser-accessible environment where agents and humans can run, inspect, and edit the app without local setup.

description.p1: Use agentic.tm for community context, events, and human networks around agent-driven development.
description.p2: The community includes 200+ engineers, researchers, and academics working on agent systems.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Use office@wunderlabs.dev for hiring, partnership, product questions, or any request that requires a human. W/underlabs is based in Europe.

about.title: <muted>We build tools</muted> that agents use to ship reliable systems.

lab.title: <muted>We are focus on</muted> reliable AI infrastructure

eval.title: Harnesses
eval.description: Test agent behavior across real workflows, regressions, and long-running tasks with reproducible harnesses.

execution.title: Agentic Dev Envs
execution.description: Run and modify generated codebases in isolated, deterministic environments with zero local setup.

telemetry.title: Human-in-the-Loop
telemetry.description: Inspect traces, review tool calls, replay failures, and keep humans involved where reliability matters.

description.p1: Publish Claude Code sessions with a single command and get a shareable link with syntax highlighting, tool calls, and the full conversation thread.
description.p2: Useful for debugging, code review, and reproducible workflows.

openable.title: Openable
openable.description: Import, run, and edit full generated codebases without installing Node.js, configuring environments, or using the terminal.
